title: Google Bans Coding With Its Biggest Attack On Devs Ever: AntiGravity 2.0
summary: Google launched Antigravity 2.0, an AI code editor that evolved into an agent control tower powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash. The platform enables AI agents to build, test, and manage code in parallel, transitioning developers from direct coding to agent supervision. The forced migration from Gemini CLI disrupted existing developer workflows.
